/usr/bin/ar qc libnodus_lib.a CMakeFiles/nodus_lib.dir/src/core/nodus_value.c.o CMakeFiles/nodus_lib.dir/src/core/nodus_routing.c.o CMakeFiles/nodus_lib.dir/src/core/nodus_storage.c.o CMakeFiles/nodus_lib.dir/src/protocol/nodus_cbor.c.o CMakeFiles/nodus_lib.dir/src/protocol/nodus_wire.c.o CMakeFiles/nodus_lib.dir/src/protocol/nodus_tier1.c.o CMakeFiles/nodus_lib.dir/src/protocol/nodus_tier2.c.o CMakeFiles/nodus_lib.dir/src/transport/nodus_tcp.c.o CMakeFiles/nodus_lib.dir/src/transport/nodus_udp.c.o CMakeFiles/nodus_lib.dir/src/crypto/nodus_sign.c.o CMakeFiles/nodus_lib.dir/src/crypto/nodus_identity.c.o CMakeFiles/nodus_lib.dir/src/channel/nodus_hashring.c.o CMakeFiles/nodus_lib.dir/src/channel/nodus_channel_store.c.o CMakeFiles/nodus_lib.dir/src/channel/nodus_replication.c.o CMakeFiles/nodus_lib.dir/src/consensus/nodus_pbft.c.o CMakeFiles/nodus_lib.dir/src/server/nodus_server.c.o CMakeFiles/nodus_lib.dir/src/server/nodus_auth.c.o CMakeFiles/nodus_lib.dir/src/client/nodus_client.c.o CMakeFiles/nodus_lib.dir/src/client/nodus_singleton.c.o CMakeFiles/nodus_lib.dir/src/client/nodus_compat.c.o CMakeFiles/nodus_lib.dir/opt/dna/shared/crypto/utils/qgp_sha3.c.o CMakeFiles/nodus_lib.dir/opt/dna/shared/crypto/utils/qgp_dilithium.c.o CMakeFiles/nodus_lib.dir/opt/dna/shared/crypto/utils/qgp_random.c.o CMakeFiles/nodus_lib.dir/opt/dna/shared/crypto/utils/qgp_platform_linux.c.o CMakeFiles/nodus_lib.dir/src/nodus_log_shim.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libnodus_lib.a
